---
title: "Michael Kjær Torbensen"
image: michael.jpeg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michael-torbensen/
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/michaeltorbensen
      target: _blank
    - text: email
      href: mkt@ucsb.edu
---

Hey! My name is Michael Torbensen. I'm a fourth-year Environmental Studies (BS) major at UC Santa Barbara. Having been raised in a beach town, my drive to conserve and protect the environment has been exemplified. This undying passion has led to my current trajectory of narrowing my studies to rivers and conservation planning. I love to be outdoors and I love, even more, finding new ways to mitigate human impacts on natural systems and ecological systems.
